text.title: Trust Boundary Diff Helper Examples
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example showing the validated artefact for a concrete scenario.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Operator triggers the methodology with a single instance (see parent skill's gap statement). Inputs collected per Prerequisites; decision-tree routes to apply; artefact drafted; validator passes.

example.note: Artefact passes `scripts/validate-trust-boundary-diff-helper.py --file artefact.json`. Owner is a single named person; rationale cites a named input; version is semver; last_reviewed is ISO date.

section.title: Reuse note
section.p: The example is a starting template. Replace the inputs_used, rationale, and decision fields with the real instance values before commit. Do NOT ship the placeholder <populated> into a real artefact store.
